EXPOSED: THE FULL DISCLOSURE

In 1954, a document was signed in the basement of a Nevada bunker that no history book will ever acknowledge. They called it the Greada Treaty — humanity's surrender in exchange for scraps of technology and the promise of "gradual integration." What they didn't tell us was that integration meant replacement. One by one, the handshakes got colder, the smiles got wider, and the pupils started splitting down the middle during live broadcasts. The TRUTHERS noticed. The TRUTHERS always notice.

They wear our faces like rental suits. They shake hands at summits while their real claws stay tucked beneath tailored sleeves. Every central bank decision, every forever-war vote, every unexplained policy reversal — it's not incompetence, it's coordination. The Disclosure Resistance began as a handful of VHS traders swapping footage of world leaders glitching on CSPAN. Now we are thousands. Now we have a token. Now we have proof of stake in the only war that matters: species survival.

"THEY CAN SHAPESHIFT ALL THEY WANT — THEY CAN'T SHAPESHIFT A DECENTRALIZED LEDGER."

$GOVLIENS isn't just a coin — it's a CITIZENSHIP REVOCATION for every cold-blooded infiltrator sitting in a leather chair making decisions for warm-blooded people. When you hold, you're not investing. You're enlisting. Every wallet is a safe house. Every transaction is a signal flare.
